remarks: 37 Arch Street presents a rare opportunity to own a boutique commercial building in the heart of downtown Greenwich, just two doors from Greenwich Avenue and moments from the Metro-North train station. This charming Federal-style property, circa 1815, is configured as executive office space and offers approximately 3,090 SF on an oversized 8,158 SF lot. The building is in excellent condition and features strong in-place tenancy, making it ideal for investors, owner-users, or potential redevelopment opportunities. Exceptionally rare for downtown Greenwich, the property includes 8 on-site outdoor parking spaces plus 2 garage spaces. Current tenant leases include 90-day vacate clauses, offering flexibility for a future owner-user seeking near-term occupancy. Located in the Central Greenwich Business District zone, the property offers potential for a wide variety of permitted uses including office, medical, retail, and possible residential conversion opportunities (buyer to verify all uses with the Town of Greenwich). Prime walk-to-town location near the Metro-North train station, luxury retail, restaurants, parks, and all the amenities of downtown Greenwich, in one of Fairfield County's most desirable commercial corridors.
